data.name: 隱居軍師的救國戰略
data.detailed_description:
这是一款即時戰略模擬遊戲，玩家將在遊戲中通過合理運用資源來發展國家。
隨著遊戲的進展，玩家會收到來自於精靈妹子，半獸人妹子的求助，繼而指揮她們的國家與軍隊，獲勝後自然不乏喜聞樂見的“褒獎”。

各階段開局為空白土地，玩家可利用即時增加的資源與人才，
來建造居住區，農場，伐木場，兵營，乃至研究所等一系列建築。
通過收集資源，強化研究，升級技能來獲得最終勝利。


  • 女主全語音
  • 動態CG
  • Live2D
  • 戰略模擬
  • 可使用技能點數強化軍隊

data.short_description: 这是一款即時戰略模擬遊戲，玩家將在遊戲中通過合理運用資源來發展國家。 各階段開局為空白土地，玩家可利用即時增加的資源與人才， 來建造居住區，農場，伐木場，兵營，乃至研究所等一系列建築。 通過收集資源，強化研究，升級技能來獲得最終勝利。
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: How a Retired Strategist Saved the Country
data.detailed_description:
How a Retired Strategist Saved the Country is a real time strategy simulation game where you manage resources to develop your country.
The player is asked by elves, beastmen... Etc. various heroines ask you for help, and then you take command of their country's army.
Will they become the victors, or princesses of ruined countries... It all depends on you.


Empty land is given to the player, and you will construct buildings to secure a population and gather resources.
■Residency
Gain population with which to gather resources
■Farm
Produces food. Food is necessary to recruit an army and keep production going.
■Lumberyard
Gather lumber here. Lumber is used to level up buildings and other things.
■Barracks
You can recruit soldiers here.

You will obtain new land when you defeat the enemy.
Some spare land has been acquired so let's try building something on it.
A building to allow you to collect new resources, a laboratory to enhance resource acquisition...
Make this country prosper with your choices.


  • Full audio
  • Strategic simulation
  • Cute anime girls
  • Live 2D
  • Skill points to enhance your army
.

Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: 10
  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
